title: Cozy Shrimp Tagliatelle
description: A buttery, tender Turkish dish featuring jumbo shrimp, prepared with a pressure cooker for convenience and low-sodium options.
instructions: Heat a pressure cooker with low-sodium chicken broth and add butter.
Add minced garlic and onion to the pot. Cook for about 2 minutes until onions are translucent.
Gently place shrimp in the pot (do not overcrowd). Cover with lid, seal the valve, and cook on high pressure for 5-7 minutes or as per manufacturer's instructions.
Allow natural release for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure. Stir in chopped parsley to taste.
Drain excess liquid from the shrimp. Toss in cooked tagliatelle ensuring it’s fully coated with sauce and garnished with more parsley if desired.
